notes: Passive - reads user data already embedded in the page via window.__sc_hydration (looking for the entry with hydratable==='user'), then shows a draggable modal titled 'SoundCloud User Data' with attribution 'Generated by a bookmarklet from https://tools.myosint.training'. Fails with alert('Could not find SoundCloud user data on this page...') if __sc_hydration is missing or has no 'user' entry.

checks.comment: At least one strong element with user data
